title: Medieval Ambience
description: Just a simple recourse pack that adds medieval action and ambience music.
body:
Minecrafts music isn't bad, but it could be better 😏! Introducing _medieval fantasy action/ambience music!_ A simple recourse pack which removes minecraft's old music and replaces it with meedieval fantasy music! 

Includes new minecraft Ender Dragon boss music! 

Every single minecraft music track (besides music disks) has been replaced.
Hope you have fun :)
